시편 47:1.content: Oh clap your hands, all you nations. Shout to God with the voice of triumph!

시편 47:2.content: For Yahweh Most High is awesome. He is a great King over all the earth.

시편 47:3.content: He subdues nations under us, and peoples under our feet.

시편 47:4.content: He chooses our inheritance for us, the glory of Jacob whom he loved.

시편 47:5.content: God has gone up with a shout, Yahweh with the sound of a trumpet.

시편 47:6.content: Sing praises to God! Sing praises! Sing praises to our King! Sing praises!

시편 47:7.content: For God is the King of all the earth. Sing praises with understanding.

시편 47:8.content: God reigns over the nations. God sits on his holy throne.

시편 47:9.content: The princes of the peoples are gathered together, the people of the God of Abraham. For the shields of the earth belong to God. He is greatly exalted!
